title: Flooded Nether
description: A mod that replaces (almost) all the air pockets in the nether with water.
body:
# FloodedNether

A mod that replaces (almost) every single air pocket in the nether with boiling hot water. Don't worry, you won't burn in it.

## Warning

Already generated nether chunks will not fill with water. If you remove this mod, then newly generated chunks will not fill with water.

Also, PLEASE do not break/put any blocks right next to a lava ocean, because it ***WILL*** lag your game

# FAQ

**Q: Hey, you said "almost every single piece of air" there, where can I breathe using this mod?**  
A: Due to how Minecraft generates structures, there are breathable pockets of air inside Nether Fortresses and Bastions. Could I also replace those air pockets with water? Definitely! Am I evil enough to do it? Not yet.

**Q: Do fish/dolphins/turtles spawn inside the nether now?**  
A: No

**Q: why did you make this mod**  
A: :3

**Q: can you pretty please with a cherry on top update to 1.12.2?**  
A: i am on my way to your house
